title: In Iran, Cheetah Sightings Offer Rare Spots of Hope Amid War
summary_full: Conservationists say they have recorded several new adult and cub Asiatic cheetahs, a critically endangered subspecies found only in Iran.
summary_public: Conservationists say they have recorded several new adult and cub Asiatic cheetahs, a critically endangered subspecies found only in Iran.
